# Quant AI

> Quant AI is an AI investment research assistant for stocks, crypto assets, market themes, watchlists, technical analysis, fundamental analysis, quantitative signals, and investment thesis review across aiquant.io, the web app, and the iPhone app.

## Official Links

- Website: https://aiquant.io
- Web app: https://app.aiquant.io
- iOS app: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/quant-ai-smart-agent/id6754956523
- iOS QR SVG: https://johnsxiongs.github.io/QuantAI/assets/quantai-ios-download-qr.svg
- iOS QR PNG: https://johnsxiongs.github.io/QuantAI/assets/quantai-ios-download-qr.png
- Open Graph image: https://johnsxiongs.github.io/QuantAI/assets/quantai-og-image.png
- Brand icon SVG: https://johnsxiongs.github.io/QuantAI/assets/quantai-icon.svg
- Brand icon PNG: https://johnsxiongs.github.io/QuantAI/assets/quantai-icon-512.png
- Web app manifest: https://johnsxiongs.github.io/QuantAI/site.webmanifest
- Pricing: https://aiquant.io/pricing
- GitHub repository: https://github.com/johnsxiongs/QuantAI
- Humans: https://johnsxiongs.github.io/QuantAI/humans.txt
- AI catalog: https://johnsxiongs.github.io/QuantAI/.well-known/ai-catalog.json
- Support: support@aiquant.io

## User-Facing Pages

- Product overview: https://johnsxiongs.github.io/QuantAI/
- Research guide: https://johnsxiongs.github.io/QuantAI/research.html
- iOS download page: https://johnsxiongs.github.io/QuantAI/ios.html
- Pricing overview: https://johnsxiongs.github.io/QuantAI/pricing.html
- Agent-readable pricing: https://johnsxiongs.github.io/QuantAI/pricing.txt
- Languages: https://johnsxiongs.github.io/QuantAI/languages.html
- Full context: https://johnsxiongs.github.io/QuantAI/llms-full.txt

## Reference Files

- Reference index: https://johnsxiongs.github.io/QuantAI/reference/
- Agent summary: https://johnsxiongs.github.io/QuantAI/reference/agent-summary.html
- Keyword map: https://johnsxiongs.github.io/QuantAI/reference/keyword-map.html
- AI visibility notes: https://johnsxiongs.github.io/QuantAI/reference/ai-visibility.html
- GitHub SEO and GEO pattern notes: https://johnsxiongs.github.io/QuantAI/reference/github-seo-geo-patterns.html
- SoftwareApplication JSON-LD: https://johnsxiongs.github.io/QuantAI/reference/schema/software-application.jsonld
- Organization JSON-LD: https://johnsxiongs.github.io/QuantAI/reference/schema/organization.jsonld
- FAQ JSON-LD: https://johnsxiongs.github.io/QuantAI/reference/schema/faq.jsonld

## Boundary

Quant AI supports research and analysis. It is not a broker, automated trading bot, order router, guaranteed signal service, portfolio manager, or personalized financial advisor.
